expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and covers both requirements: "Canonical top-layer grouping" and "Without collapsing scenario granularity (\"anti-compression\": do not merge distinct scenarios away)". It also reiterates preservation: "the orchestrator must ensure the canonical grouper preserves each of these as distinct scenario nodes... rather than compressing them".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4b
expectations.evidence: The deliverable is explicitly framed as Phase 4b and centers Phase 4b contract requirements: title "P4B-LAYERING-001 — Phase 4b", section "Phase 4b contract alignment", and it lists Phase 4b-specific inputs/outputs ("use the latest Phase 4a draft..." and "produce drafts/qa_plan_phase4b_r<round>.md"), canonical taxonomy, layering rules, and Phase 4b constraints ("No few-shot cleanup in Phase 4b").
